name: Gov. Mike Huckabee
subject: What the media would like to ignore
body:
| | Peter, This past Friday was a big day in support of the sanctity of life. People came from across the country to Washington D.C. And let me tell you, I’m not talking about the Women’s March. I’m talking about the other march that the media hardly covered. An estimated 300,000 people came for a march that has been in existence since 1973 when the Supreme Court issued their decision on Roe v. Wade. And for 47 years, the March for Life has taken place to remind the nation we are not giving up on the most vulnerable in our society. **My Faith Votes was at the event representing all our supporters and streaming live to thousands of our Facebook followers who couldn’t join us. As you can see from the picture, the crowd was massive with literally blocks of marchers passing by while we were broadcasting!** Thousands were young people, many holding signs that read, “We are the pro-life generation.” [](https://www3-myfaithvotes.nationbuilder.com/p190124apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190124apl01nd&n=1) **My Faith Votes conducted an exclusive interview with the March for Life keynote speaker, Abby Johnson, who said, “we must strive for an America where abortion isn’t just illegal — it’s unthinkable.”** Also on Friday, President Trump issued the boldest EVER pro-life statement from any President when he sent a letter to the Speaker of the House, Nancy Pelosi, vowing to veto any legislation “that weakens the current pro-life Federal policies and laws, or that encourages the destruction of innocent human life at any stage.” When people want to know why many people of faith support policies of President Trump it’s because of Trump’s stands like this. The President gets it. We are in a cultural battle. We’re already fighting for the protection of life in our legislatures and in our courts, but we must also fight for life in the cultural arena to change hearts and minds. This is why My Faith Votes is excited about the movie _Unplanned_ hitting theaters this March. It’s based on Abby Johnson’s true story of going from a Planned Parenthood regional director to an outspoken pro-life activist. This movie exposes the lies that Planned Parenthood promotes, yet offers grace to those who have chosen abortion in their past. **My Faith Votes is honored to be the technology partner for the film, providing movie-goers with simple tools to get needed support or take important action after having watched the film. The result, we will be mobilizing tens of thousands of people, convicted by this film, to stand strong in the voting booth for the sanctity of life.** **[We are using state-of-the-art mobile technology to do this – but we need your help to fund this project to make these resources available to _each movie-goer_ _in every theater_ across America.](https://www3-myfaithvotes.nationbuilder.com/p190124apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190124apl01nd&n=2)** [**DONATE NOW**](https://www3-myfaithvotes.nationbuilder.com/p190124apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190124apl01nd&n=3) This movie has the power to shift culture and reach millions of people with the truth regarding abortion. And it’s an opportunity to mobilize more Christians to stand for the most fundamental human right of all – the right to life. **[Please consider making your BEST donation today towards this effort.](https://www3-myfaithvotes.nationbuilder.com/p190124apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190124apl01nd&n=4)** If our nation fails to make a 180 U-turn and value human life, then our future as a country is dark and grim. If we fail to get this single issue right – then we will inevitably lose on all others. New York State on Tuesday legalized abortion up to birth. This evil must end. **We MUST speak truth to the lie that abortion is a simple matter of choice. It’s essential that we reverse the cultural norm on this issue and be the generation that ends abortions in America.** When we mobilize millions of Christians to take this stand – change can happen – and lives _will be_ protected and millions _can_ experience God’s grace and healing. **[Every dollar makes a difference! Please support this unique opportunity to spread a message of life across our nation.](https://www3-myfaithvotes.nationbuilder.com/p190124apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190124apl01nd&n=5)** [](https://www3-myfaithvotes.nationbuilder.com/p190124apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190124apl01nd&n=6) **United. We Stand.**

Gov. Mike Huckabee
Honorary National Chairman
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190124apl01nd&n=7)
---
* * *
©2019 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190124apl01nd&n=8).
[ ](//www.facebook.com/myfaithvotes) [ ](//www.twitter.com/myfaithvotes) [ ](//www.instagram.com/myfaithvotes)

name: Bonnie Castillo, National Nurses United
subject: Call 202-858-1717 and tell your representative to cosponsor Medicare for All
body:
Call 202-858-1717 right now and tell your representative to cosponsor the new Medicare for All Act of 2019.
# [](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a61e/bed43eb/8036fcd0/75fbb9d9/2609042329/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-header-OR")
[](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a61e/bed43eb/8036fcd0/75fbb9d8/2609042329/VEsE/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/content/medicare-for-all-nnu/?source=em190124")
Friends,
In just a few short weeks, Congresswoman Pramila Jayapal will be introducing a Medicare for All bill in the House of Representatives. Thanks to your determination and non-stop organizing, this year the House has the best chance in our nation's history of passing Medicare for All. Will you help with this historic push?
[_**Call 202-858-1717 right now and tell your representative to cosponsor the new Medicare for All Act of 2019.**_](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a61e/bed43eb/8036fcd0/75fbb9d8/2609042329/VEsF/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/content/medicare-for-all-nnu/?source=em190124")
There are 27 million people in this country with no health insurance at all and millions more who are underinsured. It is time for every member of Congress to go on the record with a vote for where they stand -- with the people or with the pharmaceutical and insurance industries.
While some establishment Democrats plan to introduce incrementalist health care bills that continue to let insurance company executives profit off of the denial of care, we know that Medicare for All is the only solution that will fix our broken health care system.
**The success of this bill in the House will depend heavily on the amount of support it has the day it is introduced.** The number of original co-sponsors will determine how seriously Medicare for All is taken by Congress, the media, and the public, so we need to get to work now.
[_**Call your Representative NOW at 202-858-1717 and ask them to sign on. Forward this email to friends and family and ask them to call, too.**_](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a61e/bed43eb/8036fcd0/75fbb9d8/2609042329/VEsC/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/content/medicare-for-all-nnu/?source=em190124")
A majority of Americans already support Medicare for All. Now, we need a majority of the members of Congress to support Medicare for All too. Thank you for your continued engagement in this movement.
In solidarity,
Bonnie Castillo
Executive Director
National Nurses United
Vice President / Executive Council Member
AFL-CIO
**[CALL 202-858-1717»](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a61e/bed43eb/8036fcd0/75fbb9d8/2609042329/VEsD/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/content/medicare-for-all-nnu/?source=em190124")**
PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
PO Box 66208
WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution's general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.
PO Box 66208, Washington, DC 20035
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a61e/bed43eb/8036fcd0/75fbb9db/2609042329/VEsA/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/information-update?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a61e/bed43eb/8036fcd0/75fbb9da/2609042329/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIyMTIzIn0=/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a61e/bed43eb/8036fcd0/75fbb9c5/2609042329/VEsO/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Help us continue transforming American politics and fighting for progressive candidates and causes by [contributing to Our Revolution here](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a61e/bed43eb/8036fcd0/75fbb9c4/2609042329/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-footer-OR").

name: Mike Thompson
subject: thank you!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress |
body:
Peter,

My team just showed me the card with your birthday wishes and
congratulations, and I’m so grateful. You make my work possible,
and I cannot thank you enough for your support.

Taking on this new role as chairman of the House Ways and Means
Subcommittee on Select Revenue Measures is a great honor, and I
do not take the responsibility lightly.

Since the beginning of my service in Congress, it has been my
priority to grow the middle class and make sure everyone has the
chance to succeed. I look forward to continuing my work to help
victims of natural disasters, modernize our nation’s
infrastructure, expand economic opportunity, and make certain
that our tax codes work for everyone and not just the few at the
top.

Thanks for all you do,

Mike

Follow on Facebook
( https://www.facebook.com/mikethompsonforcongress )

Mike Thompson is a veteran and a longtime public servant. He
represents California's 5th district in Congress, where he fights
for our healthcare and a clean environment every day. He cannot
continue to do his crucial work without the support of people
like you. Consider making a donation of any amount now.
( https://secure.actblue.com/donate/thompson-emfooter?amount=25&recurring=true&refcode=MT_EM_PT_WL_190124_2_3&firstname=%7B%7BFirstName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&lastname=%7B%7BLastName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr1=%7B%7BAddressLine1,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr2=%7B%7BAddressLine2,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&email=%7B%7BRecipientEmailAddress,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&zip=%7B%7BZipCode,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&city=%7B%7BCity,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&state=%7B%7BState,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&phone=%7B%7BPhoneNumber,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&occupation=%7B%7BOccupation,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&employer=%7B%7BEmployer,DefaultTo=%7D%7D )

-------------------------------------------------------------
| Authorized & Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress |
-------------------------------------------------------------

Mike Thompson for Congress
PO Box 10541
Napa CA 94581 United States

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no
longer receive email from us, please http://mikethompsonforcongress.ngpvanhost.com/unsubscribe?mmid=CK2t_KfgFU-Bm2oRPM3ohm6IO_CuRXeNbPcP5roWTK4=&tiid=-h4QeOrACakj3k2OFP-pUiwPYyvNlN_ipleFOhH3EBQ=.

name: Stacey Abrams
subject: We need to call our Senators
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight Action
body:
We cannot afford to wait |
---
[](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa67a/34a064cc/489964f/70c5fc6/2185117657/VEsH/ "https://www.fairfightgeorgia.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=abrams&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=IE190124GovtShutdown&source=IE190124GovtShutdown")

| | | Friend, As the White House forces our nation's longest government shut down to enter Day 34 over funding their inhumane immigration agenda, our federal workers' paychecks remain held hostage. All across the country, families are struggling to feed their families, pay bills - even afford critical medicine. At Hartsfield-Jackson Airport, TSA agents, forced to take another job that will pay for their efforts, are calling in sick and security risks continue to rise.

Our workers deserve better.

Democrats in Congress have yet another offer on the table to reopen the government; however, our senators here in Georgia have shown little indication they will accept the new plan.

But our leaders do not report to the White House - they answer to the voters who elected them to serve. **Call Senators Johnny Isakson and David Perdue today and tell their offices that they should reopen the government to support Georgia families currently struggling to get by under a Republican-led shutdown.** **Call Senator Johnny Isakson: (202) 224-3643
Call Senator David Perdue: (202) 224-3521** Georgia has been hit hard by the shutdown, both because of our federal workforce and because of the crippling effects of closed agencies on our rural communities.

Farmers cannot apply for loans, plan for the season, or make new livestock and crop purchases. News reports indicate we could lose $489 million for every month of this crisis.

Friend, this is not how government should operate. Donald Trump and his Republican allies are sponsoring a government lockout in order to funnel money towards a wall that promises to be both ineffective and unnecessary.

But we know that the strength of our collective voice is more powerful than the stubbornness of a handful of politicians.

**Stand up for your neighbors, for those in your community trying to make ends meet. Please call our Senators and let them know that they are hurting the very people they are meant to represent.** **Call Senator Johnny Isakson: (202) 224-3643
Call Senator David Perdue: (202) 224-3521** Thank you for making your voice heard,

Stacey Abrams
---
**[DONATE](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa67a/34a064cc/489964f/70c5fc7/2185117657/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fair-fight-1?refcode=IE190124GovtShutdown&utm_medium=email&utm_source=abrams&utm_content=2+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=IE190124GovtShutdown&source=IE190124GovtShutdown")**

|
---
[](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa67a/34a064cc/489964f/70c5fc4/2185117657/VEsF/ "https://www.facebook.com/stacey.abrams.77/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=abrams&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=IE190124GovtShutdown&source=IE190124GovtShutdown") [](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa67a/34a064cc/489964f/70c5fc5/2185117657/VEsC/ "https://twitter.com/fairfightaction/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=abrams&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=IE190124GovtShutdown&source=IE190124GovtShutdown") [](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa67a/34a064cc/489964f/70c5fc2/2185117657/VEsD/ "https://www.instagram.com/staceyabrams/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=abrams&utm_content=5&utm_campaign=IE190124GovtShutdown&source=IE190124GovtShutdown")

name: Roy Cooper
subject: putting food on the table during the shutdown
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
|
---
[]()
| | | Team,

The federal government has been closed 33 days, marking the longest government shutdown in history. That means 800,000 federal workers are now missing their paycheck, and North Carolinians across the state are feeling the impact.

When I visited the Coast Guard base at Elizabeth City last year, I was humbled by the courageous work our Coast Guard members do to keep us safe every day.

It is unthinkable that patriotic Americans who have sacrificed so much to serve our country could be put in a situation where they can't pay their bills and provide for their families. I won't stand for it.

Last week, I sent a letter to President Trump urging him to end this government shutdown so we can stop the suffering and take care of the service members and public servants who are impacted by this shutdown. **Now, I 'm reaching out to you because we must stand together.**

_**[Will you add your name to join me and call for President Trump to re-open the government immediately?](http://act.roycooper. "https://act.roycooper.com/page/s/call-for-president-trump-to-re-open-the-government-immediately?source=012419&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Rocky Point&state=NC&zip=28457&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

**[Add Your Name->](http://act.roycooper. "https://act.roycooper.com/page/s/call-for-president-trump-to-re-open-the-government-immediately?source=012419&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Rocky Point&state=NC&zip=28457&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**
Thank you for speaking up,

Roy
---

---

| Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
---
Roy Cooper for North Carolina
PO Box 1190
Raleigh, NC 27602 United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
[Click here](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1203ff8/2fde7c66/48a90e53/156854d5/467006747/VEsF/ "http://act.roycooper.com/unsubscribe") to unsubscribe
clean_body: | []() | | | Team, The federal government has been closed 33 days, marking the longest government shutdown in history. That means 800,000 federal workers are now missing their paycheck, and North Carolinians across the state are feeling the impact. When I visited the Coast Guard base at Elizabeth City last year, I was humbled by the courageous work our Coast Guard members do to keep us safe every day. It is unthinkable that patriotic Americans who have sacrificed so much to serve our country could be put in a situation where they can't pay their bills and provide for their families. I won't stand for it. Last week, I sent a letter to President Trump urging him to end this government shutdown so we can stop the suffering and take care of the service members and public servants who are impacted by this shutdown. Now, I 'm reaching out to you because we must stand together. " Point&state=NC&zip=28457&phone=&occupation=&employer=" " Point&state=NC&zip=28457&phone=&occupation=&employer=" Thank you for speaking up, Roy | Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Roy Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States

subject: They’ve gone too far

body:
It’s bad enough that our government remains shut down. Federal workers are going without paychecks. The humanitarian crisis at the border is left.... [ ](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=8429167db1fe456693c34fd72a419527&_e=F9SXTSgBhzV5n9Hm5ZRVbnCPcUyqLkhMWuvBHCysFigVCDEZDiu5Swuf1wTWV9O8rOE8cT9i-rxfjcpKr2DRDL4mDU2BWeAfXCUJg9KlQUGGV8nbBOTpBm-piCZ9rNlhVbtNcjT3oUvp_nxP0aW9jAA5ZUGB-l-9WxUqSrJpcQS5Kv6vrkvb2Ek5iYQ7z3pc9kFsyPtxFJb-c_E12n8y8nSN4fZN62jhVW5Zi9acBnAvI2NypPEhEuVMQifpUjQMLwKktL9m1Tumv0MxECP5pCeHVQ1OtMF8g3-B4uv_Uci0X-w39GQ2435u5xu3A7EqqEeWfYBjMPhJ2FY62sMUQpPkg_aa-5PTuoQYXsq15ZbJeZobMRqRtRMBZNtYh-HGMN9dhJ0oygzWzIcDptorx74URMu608vY9weiRY__PH4%3D) | |
---
It’s bad enough that our government remains shut down.

Federal workers are going without paychecks. The humanitarian crisis at the border is left unchecked. Now, Nancy Pelosi is even blocking President Trump from delivering the State of the Union address from the House Chamber!

All while Pelosi and her liberal colleagues STILL refuse to come to the table on border security.

**[>> ADD YOUR NAME: Tell Pelosi and Schumer to get to work, secure our border, and open the government NOW! >>](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=8429167db1fe456693c34fd72a419527&_e=F9SXTSgBhzV5n9Hm5ZRVbnCPcUyqLkhMWuvBHCysFigVCDEZDiu5Swuf1wTWV9O8rOE8cT9i-rxfjcpKr2DRDL4mDU2BWeAfXCUJg9KlQUGGV8nbBOTpBm-piCZ9rNlhVbtNcjT3oUvp_nxP0aW9jAA5ZUGB-l-9WxUqSrJpcQS5Kv6vrkvb2Ek5iYQ7z3pc9kFsyPtxFJb-c_E12n8y8ophSeJUW1p7_6w1iVZp4wFUy0Bjvim2CDsFWpD7cqS4fs2_7PKXq8mZkXQPkTeK3wlDIAGUInuk5cu5cO4VU8Z9TRtZEqoNeCeeqDbl-rqI4SXnEJFb3mjTVMZjzTww4Uclbm4QPpwpjAkR6WJ6TdsK64uk1vuluDMREN1DAjrGl0NDRrx4TntV-1xAGlryUFv4IT2TBNqVT-OxbKm-V9E%3D)**

It’s been almost a full month of their obstruction.

President Trump has made half a dozen offers and the Democrats will not move an inch - not for border security, not for America, not even to help the migrant families suffering in this crisis.

It’s time to say enough is enough.

Will you sign my petition today to encourage obstructionist Democrats to work on providing President Trump the funding he needs to secure our border and get our government back open?
|
---
[ **SIGN THE PETITION>>** ](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=8429167db1fe456693c34fd72a419527&_e=F9SXTSgBhzV5n9Hm5ZRVbnCPcUyqLkhMWuvBHCysFigVCDEZDiu5Swuf1wTWV9O8rOE8cT9i-rxfjcpKr2DRDL4mDU2BWeAfXCUJg9KlQUGGV8nbBOTpBm-piCZ9rNlhVbtNcjT3oUvp_nxP0aW9jAA5ZUGB-l-9WxUqSrJpcQS5Kv6vrkvb2Ek5iYQ7z3pc9kFsyPtxFJb-c_E12n8y8uWQOPUz1qTOPCAXJjdqfcffDVX_iXvLzKFjb-2ytEXJfoo-YE8rjtpYJSHSjefeAZLtLvqEZ28lZxHWfL76wrYzCxezIaXrISoFMq4I1cbCo3-sb7fFJi9CVpLWmiutnwE2v7lzsZGhdElRFNZn7zGf72S5FnT7gpX3W_oSHVPp6pRv_53UTBxhKy2DadiCAdjg0j8FXElERuGuHLVkcZ8%3D)
|
---
We can’t just let this go on forever.

Please add your name to encourage Congress to do the right thing:
**[https://secure.gregpencevictory.com/shutdown-515032](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=8429167db1fe456693c34fd72a419527&_e=F9SXTSgBhzV5n9Hm5ZRVbnCPcUyqLkhMWuvBHCysFigVCDEZDiu5Swuf1wTWV9O8rOE8cT9i-rxfjcpKr2DRDL4mDU2BWeAfXCUJg9KlQUGGV8nbBOTpBm-piCZ9rNlhVbtNcjT3oUvp_nxP0aW9jAA5ZUGB-l-9WxUqSrJpcQS5Kv6vrkvb2Ek5iYQ7z3pc9kFsyPtxFJb-c_E12n8y8sJhpSI0I85Ak23ISDhGouwW6_1pddrIOpPHOR02P0TIKPvgq9RILgkw2y1kdL6tigDP-54hYCOapdQjePrdafOLLHhIyTu7dA2Z6BbD9nS4fK-qeKgO3RlqMQ4GRa8JSeS_R8rZ40VqNUuy87KgE4yspavN5nZDM6ZKCGAoY-CScbC95kHBouRWPP4kfGo_dY9uOv0-1xOVwh9kMJnsTy0%3D)**

Let’s fund the wall and get the federal government back to work NOW!

Thank you,
Greg Pence

name: Debbie Wasserman Schultz
subject: Demand the Senate end this shutdown NOW
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:
Today, Senate Republicans have the chance to end this shutdown. Demand they do the right thing.
|
---
| | At any moment, the Senate will vote on the bill we passed in the House on Day One of the Democratic majority -- **to reopen the government and put federal workers back on the job without giving in to Trump's billion-dollar tantrum.** That means, Senate Republicans have the chance to do the right thing this week. Before this vote happens, I need you to make perfectly clear where you stand. [**Let Senate Republicans know you support the House's plan to reopen the government >>**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113cd6/622b7b5b/1e6e8f74/307b75fa/1114906902/VEsH/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e190125c") We've done our job here in the House led by Speaker Pelosi. President Trump has made clear that he will not end this shutdown tantrum unless we hand him billions of taxpayer dollars to waste on an ineffective wall. Whether Trump's on board or not, it's time for Senate Republicans to step up and do their job. This shutdown has gone on for far too long. And federal workers aren't the only ones suffering the consequences. The longer the government is closed, the worse it gets. New applications for Social Security and Medicare go unanswered. Seniors who rely on food assistance or Department of Housing and Urban Development rental assistance could face major problems if the shutdown drags on. It's time for us to end the Trump Shutdown and get back to governing. [**Add your name if you agree >>**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113cd6/622b7b5b/1e6e8f74/307b75fa/1114906902/VEsE/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e190125c") Debbie
---

|
---

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: Nine years ago
body:
Join me in supporting a constitutional amendment to end Citizens United.
|
---

| | Peter, Nine years ago this month, the Supreme Court decided _Citizens United v. FEC_. Their ruling unleashed devastating amounts of special interest spending directly into American elections. Special interest groups have taken full advantage -- investing over a billion dollars in making elections more about who has the most money and less about which side has the best ideas. The needs of the corporations and billionaires funding these efforts have now taken center stage in Washington while the needs of the people who make this country work are ignored. **Nine years of _Citizens United_ is nine years too many.** [**I'm teaming up with _End Citizens United_ to gather grassroots momentum in favor of a constitutional amendment to end _Citizens United_ \-- and I'm asking you to join us Peter.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffdf9/4462dc26/8870d489/201eeb3b/1776664360/VEsH/ "https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/ja190124z") | | | [Sign the Petition](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffdf9/4462dc26/8870d489/201eeb3b/1776664360/VEsE/ "https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/ja190124z")
---
When billionaires and corporations spend millions to elect candidates, they gain an audience they can pressure to vote how they want -- like pass huge tax breaks for the super-rich and corporations. Part of the reason so many lawmakers in Washington don't understand or respect the dignity of work is because their campaigns are bought and paid for by special interests.
But American workers who punch a clock need leaders who will ensure they have safe working conditions, Social Security, and access to healthcare in case they get injured. People who swipe a badge need leaders who will protect their economic security, fight discrimination, and make sure the minimum wage is also a living wage. There is dignity in all work, and all workers should be heard and respected in Washington.
We can take back our democracy from powerful interest groups and corporations if we can **get their money out of our elections.** Overturning _Citizens United_ is the best way to get that done.
**The only way that will happen is if we build a movement so powerful, Republicans in Congress can't continue to ignore us.**
[**Join the movement today. Add your name to the petition >>**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffdf9/4462dc26/8870d489/201eeb3b/1776664360/VEsF/ "https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/ja190124z")
WIth gratitude,
Sherrod

|
---
[www.sherrodbrown.com](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffdf9/4462dc26/8870d489/201eeb3a/1776664360/VEsC/ "https://www.sherrodbrown.com/")
